01-candidate-registration-gaps.title: Candidate/Maid Registration — Fill Gaps
01-candidate-registration-gaps.notes: Added PlaceOfBirth, LocationType (InsideCountry/OutsideCountry) to Candidate entity. Added CertificateOfCompetency, AttestedMedicalCertificate, PassportCopy, PersonalPhoto to DocumentType enum. Frontend forms updated with new fields, photo/passport marked as required. Location filter added to candidates list. i18n keys added for en/ar. Migration: AddCandidateRegistrationGaps.

02-trial-period-workflow.title: Trial Period Workflow
02-trial-period-workflow.notes: New Trial module created (Trial.Contracts + Trial.Core). Trial entity with 5-day auto-calculated end date, status machine (Active/Successful/Failed/Cancelled), outcome tracking (ProceedToContract/ReturnToInventory). Worker validation via raw SQL (must be InCountry + Available/NewArrival). Events: TrialCreated, TrialCompleted, TrialCancelled. API: CRUD + complete + cancel endpoints. Frontend: list page with DataTableAdvanced, create page, detail page with skeleton loading, complete/cancel dialogs. Sidebar nav added. i18n en/ar. Migration: AddTrialModule.

03-returnee-process.title: Returnee Process
03-returnee-process.notes: New Returnee module (Returnee.Contracts + Returnee.Core). ReturneeCase entity with ReturnType (ReturnToOffice/ReturnToCountry), status workflow (Submitted/UnderReview/Approved/Rejected/Settled), guarantee period tracking, amortization refund formula (ValuePerMonth = TotalAmountPaid/24, RefundAmount = TotalPaid - MonthsWorked*ValuePerMonth). ReturneeExpense entity for tracking costs (visa, ticket, medical, transport, accommodation). Cross-module validation via raw SQL for workers, contracts, clients. Events: ReturneeCaseCreated, ReturneeCaseApproved, ReturneeCaseSettled. API: CRUD + approve/reject/settle + add expense + refund calculation. Permissions: returnees.view/create/manage/settle/delete. Frontend: list page with DataTableAdvanced (filter by status/type), create page, detail page with refund breakdown, expense table, approve/reject/settle/add-expense dialogs, skeleton loading. Sidebar nav, i18n en/ar. Migration: AddReturneeModule.

04-runaway-maid-process.title: Runaway Maid Process
04-runaway-maid-process.notes: New Runaway module (Runaway.Contracts + Runaway.Core). RunawayCase entity with status workflow (Reported/UnderInvestigation/Confirmed/Settled/Closed). On report: worker set to Absconded, contract Terminated via raw SQL. Guarantee period detection from contract's guarantee_end_date. RunawayExpense entity for cost tracking (CommissionRefund/VisaCost/MedicalCost/TransportationCost/Other) with PaidBy party. Supplier liability tracking when within guarantee. Events: RunawayCaseReportedEvent, RunawayCaseConfirmedEvent. Permissions: runaways.view/report/manage/settle/delete. API: CRUD + confirm/settle/close + add expense + status history. BFF enrichment for worker/client names. Frontend: list page with DataTableAdvanced + status filter, report page, detail page with supplier liability banner, expenses table, status history timeline, action dialogs, skeleton loading. Sidebar nav, i18n en/ar. Migration: AddRunawayModule.

05-visa-processing-module.title: Visa Processing Module
05-visa-processing-module.notes: New Visa module (Visa.Contracts + Visa.Core). VisaApplication entity with VisaType (EmploymentVisa/ResidenceVisa/EmiratesId), status workflow (NotStarted/DocumentsCollecting/Applied/UnderProcess/Approved/Rejected/Issued/Expired/Cancelled). VisaApplicationStatusHistory for audit trail. VisaApplicationDocument entity with VisaDocumentType (AttestedMedicalCertificate/PassportCopy/Photo/LocalMedical/MedicalCertificate/Other). Document requirements vary by visa type and worker location (inside/outside country). Sequencing enforced: Employment Visa must be approved before Residence Visa. Duplicate active visa prevention. Auto-generated application codes (VSA-000001). Events: VisaApplicationCreatedEvent, VisaStatusChangedEvent, VisaIssuedEvent. BFF enrichment for worker/client names. Permissions: visas.view/create/manage/delete. Frontend: list page with DataTableAdvanced + status/type filters, create page with document requirements preview, detail page with status timeline + document checklist + transition dialog, skeleton loading. Sidebar nav (Stamp icon), i18n en/ar. Migration: AddVisaModule.

06-arrival-management.title: Arrival Management
06-arrival-management.notes: New Arrival module (Arrival.Contracts + Arrival.Core). Arrival entity with status workflow (Scheduled/InTransit/Arrived/PickedUp/AtAccommodation/NoShow/Cancelled). ArrivalStatusHistory for audit trail. Flight info, driver assignment, photo URLs (pre-travel/arrival/pickup), accommodation confirmation, customer pickup tracking. Auto-code generation (ARR-000001). PlacementStatusChangedConsumer auto-creates arrivals on TicketArranged. NonArrivalCheckJob (Hangfire hourly) detects overdue arrivals and publishes MaidNoShowEvent. BFF enrichment for worker names/photos with IFileStorageService presigned URLs. Permissions: arrivals.view/create/manage/driver_actions/delete. Frontend: list page with DataTableAdvanced + status filter + overdue highlighting, schedule page, detail page with status stepper + info cards + action dialogs + photo gallery + status history timeline, skeleton loading. Sidebar nav (Plane icon), i18n en/ar. Migration: AddPlacementModule (shared).

07-accommodation-module.title: Accommodation Management Module
07-accommodation-module.notes: AccommodationStay entity with CheckedIn/CheckedOut status and DepartureReason enum. Service with check-in/check-out, daily list, current occupants, worker history. Consumers: MaidAtAccommodationConsumer (auto check-in from arrival), PlacementStatusChangedConsumer (auto checkout on deploy), RunawayCaseConfirmedConsumer, ReturneeCaseApprovedConsumer. Frontend: list page with current/all/daily views, detail page with check-out dialog, check-in form. Permissions: accommodations.view, accommodations.manage. Migration: AddAccommodationModule.
